gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/137)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/137)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) لَمَّا حَضَرَتْ أَبِي عَلِيَّ بْنَ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) الْوَفَاةُ ضَمَّنِي إِلَى صَدْرِهِ وَ قَالَ يَا بُنَيَّ أُوصِيكَ بِمَا أَوْصَانِي بِهِ أَبِي حِينَ حَضَرَتْهُ الْوَفَاةُ وَ بِمَا ذَكَرَ أَنَّ أَبَاهُ أَوْصَاهُ بِهِ يَا بُنَيَّ اصْبِرْ عَلَى الْحَقِّ وَ إِنْ كَانَ مُرّاً .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Ismail Bin Mihran, from Dorost Bin Abu Mansour, from Isa Bin Bashir, from Abu Hamza who said,

‘Abu Ja’far<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said, when the termination presented itself to my<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> father<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> Ali<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> pressed me<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> to his<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> chest and said: ‘O my<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> son<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>! I<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> bequeath you<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> with what my<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> father<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> bequeathed to me<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> when the termination presented itself to him<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, and with what he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> mentioned that his<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> father<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> bequeathed with: ‘O my<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> son<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>! Be patience upon the truth, and even though it may be bitter’.
en.sarwar: 13. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Isma’il ibn Mehran from Durust ibn abu Mansur from ‘Isa ibn Bashir from abu Hamza who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said, ‘When my father Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.) was about to leave this world he held me against his chest and said, “My son, I recommend you with the same recommendation with which he (my father) advised me at the time that he was about to leave this world and with the recommendation that his father had made to him, O my son, hold to the truth with patience even if it is very bitter.”’”
